testcase.name: parseTokensFromContent > extracts color tokens from YAML frontmatter
parseTokensFromContent > extracts typography tokens including all three font families
parseTokensFromContent > extracts rounded tokens
parseTokensFromContent > extracts spacing tokens
parseTokensFromContent > YAML wins over text section — text section hex values are not in tokens
parseTokensFromContent > primary color comes from YAML, not from text-section editorial hint
parseTokensFromContent > throws on missing opening ---
parseTokensFromContent > throws on missing closing ---
parseTokensFromContent > throws on corrupt YAML with line number in message
parseTokensFromContent > returns empty objects for missing optional sections
BaseSpecialist abstract contract > concrete subclass implements execute and can be instantiated
LLMGateway.selectTier > returns reasoning for reasoning hint
LLMGateway.selectTier > returns lightweight for lightweight hint
trace_id propagation > extractTraceId returns the X-Trace-Id header value
trace_id propagation > extractTraceId returns empty string when header absent
trace_id propagation > generateHttpTraceId returns a 16-char hex string
trace_id propagation > generateHttpTraceId is unique per call
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-4: throws FORBIDDEN when activeAccountId is null
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-4: calls next=false (does not proceed) when activeAccountId missing
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-5: skips RLS and calls next when meta.isGlobal=true
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-5: isGlobal skips even when activeAccountId is present
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: sets app.current_account_id via set_config for valid context
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: sets app.current_user_id when user.id is present
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: skips app.current_user_id when user is null
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: calls next with updated ctx including transaction prisma
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: wraps resolver in $transaction (ensures set_config is LOCAL)
ipAccounts.active > returns null when no account found
ipAccounts.active > returns account data when found
ipAccounts.active > queries with activeAccountId from ctx
ipAccounts.switchActive > updates user.activeAccountId and writes audit_log
ipAccounts.switchActive > throws NOT_FOUND when account does not belong to user
ipAccounts.switchActive > throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in ctx
ipAccounts.switchActive > zod: rejects non-positive accountId
ipAccounts.switchActive > zod: rejects non-integer accountId
stepData.save > upserts step data and returns { ok: true, data }
stepData.save > passes traceId from ctx to upsert
stepData.save > zod: rejects empty stepKey
stepData.save > zod: accepts empty inputs object
auth.me > returns unauthenticated stub when no user in ctx
auth.me > returns user info when authenticated
auth.me > exposes only id, email, name (not password or session data)
analysis.analyze — happy path > calls AnalysisAgent(mode=structural), writes history with contentType=json + full fields
analysis.analyze — zod validation > copy < 10 字 (empty string) → TRPCError BAD_REQUEST
analysis.analyze — fallback path > agent returns isFallback=true (SchemaValidationError caught internally) → history written isFallback=true
analysis.analyze — agentMode field > agentMode="structural" is always written to history regardless of result
boomGenerate.generate — happy path > calls CopywritingAgent(mode=boom), writes history with D-032 --- separator + full fields
boomGenerate.generate — zod validation > empty elements array → TRPCError BAD_REQUEST
boomGenerate.generate — fallback path > agent returns isFallback=true → history written with isFallback=true
boomGenerate.generate — agentMode field > agentMode="boom" is always written to history
copywriting.freeGenerate — happy path > calls CopywritingAgent(mode=free), writes history with full fields, returns row
copywriting.freeGenerate — zod validation > empty topic → TRPCError BAD_REQUEST
copywriting.freeGenerate — fallback path > agent returns isFallback=true → history written with isFallback=true
copywriting.freeGenerate — agentMode field > agentMode="free" is always written to history regardless of result
costLog.logFeedback > AC-18-1: logFeedback writes cost_log with eventType=good and correct fields
costLog.logFeedback > AC-18-2: event_type enum — 'bad' maps correctly
costLog.logFeedback > AC-18-3: RLS isolation — accountId comes from ctx.activeAccountId, not input
costLog.logFeedback > AC-18-4: target JSON complete — stepKey + agentId + traceId all present
costLog.logFeedback > AC-10: type not in [good,bad] → zod input rejection
costLog.logFeedback > AC-12: DB error → returns { ok: false } without throwing
costLog.logFeedback > AC-11: traceId propagated from x-trace-id header into cost_log
costLog.logFeedback > AC-20: logFeedback < 50ms (single INSERT with mock DB)
history.list > AC-2: list all — findMany called with accountId + orderBy createdAt desc
history.list > AC-2: filter by agentMode — where includes agentMode
history.list > AC-2: filter by agentId
history.list > AC-2: filter by sourceType
history.list > AC-2: dateRange=last_7d → createdAt gte filter added
history.list > AC-2: pagination — take=limit skip=offset passed through
history.list > AC-12: limit > 100 → zod BAD_REQUEST
history.detail > AC-3: detail — findFirst with id + accountId
history.detail > AC-13: detail not found → NOT_FOUND
history.delete > AC-4: delete — deleteMany with id + accountId → { ok: true }
history.delete > AC-13: delete cross-account blocked by explicit accountId where
invite.redeem — success > AC-3: calls findUnique then update with usedById=user.id and returns updated invite
invite.redeem — duplicate > AC-4: already-used invite code → throws CONFLICT 409
invite.redeem — not found > unknown code → throws NOT_FOUND
invite.redeem — unauthenticated > no user session → throws UNAUTHORIZED
getProgress > returns 0/9 with empty completedSteps when no stepData rows exist
getProgress > returns 3/9 when 3 completed-status rows returned
getProgress > returns 9/9 when all 9 steps completed
getProgress > passes correct accountId for account isolation
getProgress > queries only status=completed rows (belt-and-suspenders beyond RLS)
getProgress > queries only STEP_KEYS_9 (step2 excluded)
getProgress > switching account ID returns independent progress
ipAccounts.list > AC-5: calls findMany without explicit where:{userId} (RLS handles it)
ipAccounts.active > returns the active account by activeAccountId
ipAccounts.active > returns null when account not found
ipAccounts.create > creates account with user.id from context
ipAccounts.update > updates the active account (where:{id: activeAccountId})
ipAccounts.delete > soft-deletes by setting isActive=false + archivedAt
ipAccounts.switchActive > AC-6: updates user.activeAccountId and writes audit_log
ipAccounts.switchActive > AC-6: throws UNAUTHORIZED when user is null
ipAccounts.switchActive > AC-6: throws NOT_FOUND when account does not belong to user
stepData.get > AC-8: queries by stepKey only (no accountId — RLS handles it)
stepData.get > returns null when stepKey not found
stepData.getAll > calls findMany without where:{accountId} (RLS handles it)
stepData.save > AC-7: upserts with accountId_stepKey composite key
stepData.progress > returns completed/total counts for the current account
stepData.progress > returns zero completed when no step data exists
knowledge.getRecommendations > returns mock recommendation array without DB calls
knowledge.getScriptCases > returns mock script case array and echoes industry filter
knowledge.getFavorites > calls knowledgeFavorite.findMany and returns favorites array
knowledge.addFavorite > AC-6: creates favorite with activeAccountId (per-account isolation)
knowledge.removeFavorite > calls knowledgeFavorite.deleteMany with accountId+itemType+itemKey and returns {ok:true}
knowledge.getNotes > calls knowledgeNote.findMany and returns notes array
knowledge.addNote > creates note with activeAccountId and content
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-3: happy path — primary succeeds, no fallback field
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-3: primary fails both attempts → falls back to gpt-4o
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-3: retry once — fails first, succeeds second (same primary)
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-4: both providers fail → returns fallback template string
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-4: both fail → cost_log written with success=false
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-5: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing → throws specific error
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-6: cost_log written on success with correct fields
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-6: cost_log res.fallback present when fallback used
LLMGateway · fallback > lightweight tier: primary is haiku, fallback is gpt-4o-mini
LLMGateway · rate limiting > AC-11: throws RateLimitError when quota exceeded, no LLM call
LLMGateway · rate limiting > AC-11: RateLimitError has correct userId and code
LLMGateway · rate limiting > AC-11: checkRateLimit is called with userId from metadata
LLMGateway · rate limiting > checkRateLimit called once per complete() call
LLMGateway · rate limiting > RateLimitError constructor sets message and code
LLMGateway · rate limiting > complete() succeeds when rate limit passes
copywriting.generate > US-009 AC-5/AC-7: calls CopywritingAgent, writes real markdown to History row
copywriting.optimize > AC-7: creates History row for optimization with traceId
copywriting.list > returns array of history entries without hitting history.create
copywriting.delete > calls history.delete with the given historyId and returns {ok: true}
videoAnalysis.analyze > AC-7: calls AnalysisAgent(viral), creates History row with agentId=AnalysisAgent and traceId
videoProduction.generate > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=video_production
videoProduction.generateStoryboard > AC-7: creates History row for storyboard with traceId
videoProduction.generateSceneImage > AC-7: creates History row for scene image with traceId
boomGenerate.generate > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=CopywritingAgent and traceId
monetization.generate > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=monetization and traceId
privateDomain.generate > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=PrivateDomainAgent and traceId
diagnosis.generate > AC-7: creates DiagnosisReport row with agentId=DiagnosisAgent and traceId
diagnosis.generate > zod: rejects answers array with wrong length
diagnosis.history > calls diagnosisReport.findMany with default limit=10
diagnosis.latest > calls diagnosisReport.findFirst ordered by createdAt desc
diagnosis.latest > returns null when no reports found
evolution.evolve > AC-7: creates FeedbackLog row with rating and agentId
evolution.getConfig > returns profile config when profile exists
evolution.getConfig > returns default config when profile does not exist
evolution.updateConfig > upserts EvolutionProfile and returns ok + updated config
evolution.history > calls evolutionInsight.findMany with default limit=20
evolution.recentFeedback > calls feedbackLog.findMany and returns array
evolution.recentFeedback > passes agentId filter to where clause when provided
evolution.feedbackTrend > returns mock trend data with requested days
evolution.moduleRanking > returns mock ranking array
deepLearning.list > calls deepLearningArchive.findMany with isActive filter by default
deepLearning.create > creates DeepLearningArchive with sourceType=text
deepLearning.createFromFile > creates archive with sourceType=file and placeholder sample
deepLearning.learn > updates archive learningStatus to pending and returns {ok:true, status:"queued"}
deepLearning.delete > soft-deletes archive by setting isActive=false
trending.fetch > AC-5: returns mock TrendingItem array without RLS transaction
trending.listByIndustry > returns mock items with the requested industry
trending.listByStyle > returns mock items with the requested presentStyle
videoAnalysis.analyze — happy path > calls AnalysisAgent(mode=viral), writes history with agentMode=viral + contentType=json + elements + full fields
videoAnalysis.analyze — zod validation > lastCopy empty (< 10 字) → TRPCError BAD_REQUEST
videoAnalysis.analyze — fallback path (Specialist schema fail → isFallback) > agent returns isFallback=true (viral mode insights < 3 caught internally) → history written isFallback=true
videoAnalysis.analyze — elements 数组传递 > elements 空数组 → history.elements=[] 不阻断(AC-9 · LLM 无识别元素场景)
MockProvider > validateCallback always returns mock dev user
MockProvider > getAuthorizationUrl returns URL with /auth/callback?mock=true
validateStartupConfig > calls process.exit(1) when SESSION_SECRET < 32 chars
validateStartupConfig > calls process.exit(1) when OAUTH_PROVIDER is unknown
validateStartupConfig > calls process.exit(1) when NODE_ENV=production and OAUTH_PROVIDER=mock
requiresCsrfCheck > returns false for mock provider (name=mock) — dev only
requiresCsrfCheck > returns true for google provider — always enforced
requiresCsrfCheck > returns true for any unknown real provider
requiresCsrfCheck > attack scenario: ?mock=true query param cannot bypass CSRF for google provider
piiMask · string masking > email 脱敏 → <EMAIL>
piiMask · string masking > CN phone 11 位 → <PHONE>
piiMask · string masking > id_card 18 位 → <ID_CARD>
piiMask · string masking > bank card 16-19 位 → <BANK_CARD>
piiMask · string masking > 无 PII → 原样
piiMask · recursive object masking > 递归脱敏 nested object string
piiMask · recursive object masking > Date / Map / Set / Buffer 不破坏
piiMask · recursive object masking > null / undefined / number / boolean 原样
appendDisclaimerIfSensitive > 医疗 industry → markdown 末尾加医疗免责
appendDisclaimerIfSensitive > 金融 industry → 投资风险免责
appendDisclaimerIfSensitive > 法律 industry → 法律意见免责
appendDisclaimerIfSensitive > 非敏感 industry (健身) → 原样不加
appendDisclaimerIfSensitive > 空 industry → 原样
attachDisclaimerMeta > 医疗 → 加 _disclaimer 字段
attachDisclaimerMeta > 非敏感 → 不加 _disclaimer
ContextAssembler._formatUserPrompt 接 piiMask (TD-016) > input string 含 PII → userPrompt 含 <EMAIL>/<PHONE> 而非原文
ContextAssembler._formatUserPrompt 接 piiMask (TD-016) > input object 嵌套 PII → 递归脱敏
BaseSpecialist.execute 接 disclaimer (TD-016) > 医疗 industry + markdown output → 末尾追加医疗免责
BaseSpecialist.execute 接 disclaimer (TD-016) > 医疗 industry + JSON output → 加 _disclaimer 元数据
BaseSpecialist.execute 接 disclaimer (TD-016) > 非敏感 industry (健身) → markdown 不加 disclaimer
BaseSpecialist.execute 接 disclaimer (TD-016) > input 没 industry → 原样无 disclaimer
constants > HOT_ELEMENT_KEYS_22 has exactly 22 items
constants > SCRIPT_TYPE_KEYS_20 has exactly 20 items
constants > HOT_ELEMENT_KEYS_22 contains expected keys
constants > SCRIPT_TYPE_KEYS_20 contains expected keys
constants > HOT_ELEMENT_KEYS_22 has no duplicates
analysisStructuralInput > passes with valid copy ≥10 chars
analysisStructuralInput > fails when copy is too short (<10 chars)
analysisStructuralInput > fails when copy exceeds 3000 chars
analysisViralInput > passes with lastCopy only (lastTitle optional)
analysisViralInput > passes with both lastTitle and lastCopy
analysisViralInput > fails when lastCopy is missing
analysisViralInput > fails when lastTitle exceeds 200 chars
analysisStructuralOutput > passes with valid structural output
analysisStructuralOutput > fails when optimizations has fewer than 3 items
analysisStructuralOutput > fails when score value exceeds 100
analysisViralOutput > passes with valid viral output
analysisViralOutput > fails when insights has fewer than 3 items
copywritingFreeGenerateInput > passes with valid input
copywritingFreeGenerateInput > fails when elements is empty
generateBoomInput > passes with elements only
generateBoomInput > fails when elements is empty
boomOutput > passes with exactly 5 candidates
boomOutput > fails with 4 candidates (must be exactly 5)
analyzeVideoInput (PRD-5 rewrite) > passes with lastCopy only
analyzeVideoInput (PRD-5 rewrite) > no longer accepts videoUrl field (PRD-2 removed)
copywritingFreeOutput > fails when markdown is too short (<400 chars)
ContextAssembler > all routes succeed → AssembledContext 结构完整
ContextAssembler > stepData 非空 → layersUsed 包含 L2_step_data
ContextAssembler > stepData 为空 → 注入占位 [新用户 · 暂无 step 数据]
ContextAssembler > L4 EvolutionProfile 降级 → 注入 [L1 阶段 · 暂无进化档案]
ContextAssembler > L5 RAG 降级 → ragHits 为空数组
ContextAssembler > L2 stepData fetch timeout → 占位注入 · constants 层不受影响
ContextAssembler > L2 fetch reject → 降级占位 · assemble 不抛出
ContextAssembler > 7 PRD-4 Specialist agentId 全有模板覆盖
ContextAssembler > 每个模板 persona 和 methodology 字段非空
ContextAssembler > MethodologyQueryWorker 拉常量 → systemPrompt 含脚本类型和爆款元素
ContextAssembler > contextTokens 等于 chars/4 粗算
ContextAssembler > metadata.layersUsed 仅含成功层(L2 失败时不含 L2)
ContextAssembler > R-001: systemPrompt 不含 BASE_LLM_URL / LLM_API_KEY / sk-
ContextAssembler > assemble 耗时 ≤ 800ms(并行 4 路 · 模拟正常 DB 响应)
ContextAssembler > prisma.stepData.findMany 调用时传入正确 accountId(反模式 REJ-008)
ContextAssembler > 无模板的 agentId(DiagnosisAgent) → fallback persona · 不抛出
render: StepForm schema structure > Step1InputSchema has lastIndustry field
render: StepForm schema structure > STEP_INDUSTRY_KEYS has 56 industries
render: StepForm schema structure > STEP_PLATFORM_KEYS has 5 platforms
render: StepForm schema structure > STEP_CATEGORY_KEYS has 5 categories
render: StepForm schema structure > Step7InputSchema has lastElements array with max 5
submit happy: valid data passes zod parse > Step1InputSchema passes with valid industry key
submit happy: valid data passes zod parse > Step3InputSchema passes with valid platform and strings
submit happy: valid data passes zod parse > Step5InputSchema passes with valid category
submit happy: valid data passes zod parse > Step6InputSchema passes with ≥50 chars source copy
submit happy: valid data passes zod parse > Step8InputSchema passes with all required fields
zod fail inline error: Chinese error messages > Step1InputSchema shows 行业必填 when industry is empty
zod fail inline error: Chinese error messages > Step3InputSchema shows error when personalInfo is too short
zod fail inline error: Chinese error messages > Step3InputSchema shows error when platform missing
zod fail inline error: Chinese error messages > Step6InputSchema shows error when sourceCopy is too short
zod fail inline error: Chinese error messages > Step7InputSchema shows error when topic is too short
mutation success: full valid payloads pass all schemas > Step7InputSchema passes with script type + elements + topic
mutation success: full valid payloads pass all schemas > Step7InputSchema rejects more than 5 elements
mutation error toast: error structures are consistent > Step5InputSchema fails with Chinese error when product too short
mutation error toast: error structures are consistent > Step8InputSchema fails with readable error when experience invalid
Step1Result > render: handles valid step1 output shape (industry + marketAnalysis + competitionLevel + recommendation)
Step3Result > render: handles valid step3 output shape (nickname[5] + avatar + background + bio[6] + strategy)
Step3bResult > render: handles valid step3b output shape (coreIdentity + thoughtSystem + contentPersona + trustBuilding + personaRoadmap)
Step4Result > render: handles markdown output — uses react-markdown, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML
Step4bResult > render: handles valid step4b output shape (currentAnalysis + ladder[3] + revenueStructure + successCases[2])
Step5Result > render: 20 topics list wrapped in ScrollArea h-96 (AGENTS.md §11.4)
Step6Result > render: 13-column shot table with horizontal scroll
Step7Result > render: markdown + structure/hooks/cta sidebar layout
Step8Result > render: 2-segment livestream script comparison (lastResult + lastOptimizedResult)
StepResult generic wrapper > routes all 9 stepKeys to correct components
getToolLsKey (D-031) > generates correct LS key format
getToolLsKey (D-031) > includes toolKey in the namespace (not stepKey pattern)
getToolLsKey (D-031) > includes accountId in the namespace for isolation
getToolLsKey (D-031) > includes suffix parameter
generate tool schema (copywritingFreeGenerateInput) > passes with valid scriptType + elements + topic
generate tool schema (copywritingFreeGenerateInput) > fails with invalid scriptType
generate tool schema (copywritingFreeGenerateInput) > fails with more than 8 elements
boom-generate tool schema (generateBoomInput) > passes with elements only
boom-generate tool schema (generateBoomInput) > accepts optional industry and theme
analysis tool schema (analysisStructuralInput) > passes with valid copy
analysis tool schema (analysisStructuralInput) > fails with copy shorter than 10 chars
video-analysis tool schema (analyzeVideoInput) > passes with lastCopy
video-analysis tool schema (analyzeVideoInput) > accepts optional lastTitle
ToolForm component (source inspection) > uses AbortController on unmount
ToolForm component (source inspection) > implements LS-first dual-write (REJ-035)
ToolForm component (source inspection) > keeps LS on DB fail and shows toast (not rollback)
ToolForm component (source inspection) > accepts defaultValues prop
ToolForm component (source inspection) > uses zodResolver
ToolForm component (source inspection) > has data-testid for each toolKey
ToolForm component (source inspection) > handles all 4 toolKeys in switch statement

ToolResult: switch by toolKey > handles boom-generate case → BoomGenerateResult
ToolResult: switch by toolKey > handles analysis case → AnalysisResult
ToolResult: switch by toolKey > handles video-analysis case → VideoAnalysisResult
ToolResult: no dangerouslySetInnerHTML in any result component > ToolResult.tsx is safe
ToolResult: no dangerouslySetInnerHTML in any result component > FreeGenerateResult.tsx is safe
ToolResult: no dangerouslySetInnerHTML in any result component > BoomGenerateResult.tsx is safe
ToolResult: no dangerouslySetInnerHTML in any result component > AnalysisResult.tsx is safe
ToolResult: no dangerouslySetInnerHTML in any result component > VideoAnalysisResult.tsx is safe

ToolResult: data-testid in each sub-component > BoomGenerateResult has data-testid
ToolResult: data-testid in each sub-component > AnalysisResult has data-testid
ToolResult: data-testid in each sub-component > VideoAnalysisResult has data-testid
useStepData LS logic > save writes inputs under account-namespaced key (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > load reads the LS value back for the same account (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > load returns null when key is absent (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > LS is NOT rolled back after simulated DB failure (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > accountId=null: save writes nothing to LS (AC-1 guard)
useStepData LS logic > different step keys produce distinct LS entries (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > save prunes non-active namespaces when LS is near 5 MB (AC-8)
useActiveAccount LS logic > switchTo clears all LS keys of the old account namespace (AC-2, AC-6)
useActiveAccount LS logic > switchTo preserves new account namespace (AC-2)
useActiveAccount LS logic > grep simulation: 0 hits for old namespace after switch (AC-6)
useActiveAccount LS logic > multiple tabs: each tab has its own storage — LS does not bleed (AC-7)
useEvolution LS logic > caches evolution profile to LS with account-namespaced key (AC-3)
useEvolution LS logic > returns null when no LS cache for evolution (AC-3 initial state)
useEvolution LS logic > LS cache key is account-specific — no bleed between accounts (AC-7)
useEvolution LS logic > LS cache for switched-from account is cleared; new account cache intact (AC-3)
useEvolution LS logic > handles malformed LS JSON gracefully (parse safety)
ls-namespace key builders > key-01: stepLsKey account=1 step=step1
ls-namespace key builders > key-02: stepLsKey account=1 step=step2
ls-namespace key builders > key-03: stepLsKey account=1 step=step3
ls-namespace key builders > key-04: stepLsKey account=1 step=step4
ls-namespace key builders > key-05: stepLsKey account=1 step=step5
ls-namespace key builders > key-06: stepLsKey account=1 step=step6
ls-namespace key builders > key-07: stepLsKey account=1 step=step7
ls-namespace key builders > key-08: stepLsKey account=1 step=step8
ls-namespace key builders > key-09: stepLsKey account=1 step=step9
ls-namespace key builders > key-10: evolutionLsKey account=1
ls-namespace key builders > key-11: stepLsKey account=42 must use account 42 namespace
ls-namespace key builders > key-12: evolutionLsKey account=42
ls-namespace key builders > key-13: accountLsPrefix has trailing underscore
ls-namespace key builders > key-14: LS_PREFIX is correct
ls-namespace key builders > key-15: stepLsKey account=0 is well-formed
clearLsNamespace > key-16: removes all keys for the target account namespace
clearLsNamespace > key-17: preserves keys from other account namespaces (AC-6 isolation)
lsUsedBytes and pruneLsNamespaces > key-18: pruneLsNamespaces removes non-active keys when limit exceeded
router route count (AC-001) > has exactly 9 step routes
router route count (AC-001) > has exactly 14 tool routes
router route count (AC-001) > has exactly 6 new module routes
router route count (AC-001) > has 3 auxiliary routes + catch-all = 4 extra
router route count (AC-001) > total router children = 34 (33 path routes + 1 root index redirect)
router route count (AC-001) > covers all 9 step keys from ARCHITECTURE §3.6.4
router route count (AC-001) > includes /ip-plan route (AC-001 §9.4 exit condition)
router route count (AC-001) > includes /accounts route (AC-001 account switcher)
router route count (AC-001) > catch-all wildcard present for /404 fallback (AC-001)
router route count (AC-001) > no duplicate routes
router route count (AC-001) > all tool hrefs from Header.tsx TOOLS_14 are covered
router route count (AC-001) > all new module hrefs from Header.tsx NEW_MODULES_6 are covered
stepConfig > has exactly 9 entries
stepConfig > contains all expected step keys
stepConfig > every entry has non-empty title
stepConfig > every entry has non-empty description
stepConfig > every entry has non-empty phase
stepConfig > step1 has correct title
stepConfig > step9 has correct title
stepConfig > step5 phase is 运营
stepConfig > returns undefined for unknown key
US-003 AC-3: schema validation pass (no retry) > valid LLM output passes on first invokeLLM call — gateway called once
US-003 AC-3: schema validation fail → retry → pass > invalid first output retries, second valid output succeeds — gateway called twice
US-003 AC-3: schema validation fail → retry → fail → SchemaValidationError > two consecutive invalid outputs throw SchemaValidationError
US-003 AC-3: schema validation fail → retry → fail → SchemaValidationError > SchemaValidationError carries llmRawOutput
US-003 AC-4: cost_log callType + target > cost_log written with callType=specialist_call and target.agentId
US-003 AC-5: traceId uses generateSpecialistTraceId pattern > auto-generated traceId follows tr_accountId_agentId_... format
US-003 AC-6: LLMTimeoutError from AbortError > AbortError from invokeLLM is converted to LLMTimeoutError
US-003 AC-1: responseFormat json_schema passed to gateway > invokeLLM passes responseFormat:{type:json_schema} to llmGateway.complete
BaseSpecialist — input schema validation > AC-8: valid input passes inputSchema.parse and proceeds
BaseSpecialist — input schema validation > AC-8: invalid input (empty topic) throws ZodError before LLM call
BaseSpecialist — output schema validation > AC-8: SchemaValidationError thrown when output fails outputSchema.safeParse
BaseSpecialist — output schema validation > AC-8: valid output passes safeParse and returns SpecialistResponse
BaseSpecialist — template method 4 steps > AC-8: execute() calls contextAssembler.assemble before invokeLLM
BaseSpecialist — template method 4 steps > AC-8: execute() result contains tokensUsed matching gateway response
BaseSpecialist — 五层配置完整性 > AC-8: config has all 5 required layers (persona/memory/knowledge/tools/execution)
BaseSpecialist — 五层配置完整性 > AC-8: config.execution.model_tier drives model selection (no hardcoded model names)
BaseSpecialist — mock LLMGateway injection > AC-8: injected gateway.complete is called with model_tier from config
BaseSpecialist — mock LLMGateway injection > AC-8: isFallback=true propagated when gateway returns isFallback
BaseSpecialist — cost_log 写入字段完整(AC-7) > AC-8: writeCostLog called with all 7 required fields
BaseSpecialist — 性能(AC-9) > AC-9: class instantiation < 5ms
BaseSpecialist — 性能(AC-9) > AC-9: 100 mock execute() runs without LLM < 1s
Error classes > SchemaValidationError has correct name and issues
Error classes > LLMTimeoutError has correct name, agentId, timeoutMs
Error classes > FallbackTriggeredError has correct name and reason
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > PositioningAgent industry: invalid LLM output → fallback · output satisfies Step1OutputSchema (AC-16)
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > BrandingAgent packaging: invalid output → fallback · output satisfies Step3OutputSchema (AC-16)
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > MonetizationAgent: invalid output → fallback · output satisfies Step4bOutputSchema (AC-16)
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > VideoAgent shooting: invalid output → fallback · output satisfies ShootingOutputSchema (AC-16)
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > CopywritingAgent step7: stream invalid JSON → fallback · output satisfies CopywritingOutputSchema (AC-16)
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > LivestreamAgent: invalid output (short strings) → fallback · output satisfies LivestreamOutputSchema (AC-16)
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > TopicAgent traffic: stream invalid JSON → fallback · 20 topics in output (AC-16)
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > AC-9: specialist without fallbackTemplate re-throws the error on schema failure
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > AC-10: all fallbackTemplates pass their respective outputSchema (type guard)
US-015 · isFallback 降级路径 > AC-13: LLMTimeoutError on a non-mode specialist triggers fallback cost_log with model=fallback
videoProductionInput > happy path: valid sourceCopy parses successfully
videoProductionInput > boundary: sourceCopy exactly 3000 chars passes
videoProductionInput > reject: sourceCopy < 10 chars fails
videoProductionInput > reject: sourceCopy > 3000 chars fails with 原始文案不能超过3000字符
acquisitionVideoInput > happy path: valid acquisition video input parses successfully
acquisitionVideoInput > reject: invalid conversionGoal fails
aiVideoInput > happy path: scenesCount=6 + imageStyle=vivid parses
aiVideoInput > boundary: scenesCount=5 min passes
aiVideoInput > boundary: scenesCount=8 max passes
aiVideoInput > reject: scenesCount=9 fails with 镜头数应在 5-8 之间
aiVideoInput > reject: scenesCount=4 below min fails
aiVideoOutput · imagePromptEn > pass: imagePromptEn=English ASCII passes
aiVideoOutput · imagePromptEn > reject: imagePromptEn contains Chinese fails with 必须是英文 ASCII
acquisitionCopywritingInput > happy path: valid acquisition copywriting input parses
acquisitionCopywritingInput > reject: productInfo < 10 chars fails
imageGenJobPayload > happy path: valid job payload parses
imageGenJobPayload > reject: invalid imageStyle fails
imageGenJobResult > success variant: valid success result parses
imageGenJobResult > error variant: error result with placeholder parses

表单 render: Analysis.tsx structure > uses analysisStructuralInput schema
表单 render: Analysis.tsx structure > uses submitLabel 开始分析

表单 render: Analysis.tsx structure > calls trpc.analysis.analyze.useMutation

5维度 Progress: AnalysisResult > AnalysisResult renders 5 dimension labels
5维度 Progress: AnalysisResult > ToolForm analysis case has char count element
5维度 Progress: AnalysisResult > AnalysisResult handles JSON.parse error → 解析失败
5维度 Progress: AnalysisResult > AnalysisResult handles scores.overall missing → N/A
颜色逻辑: overall score color classes > uses green-500 for overall >= 80
颜色逻辑: overall score color classes > uses yellow-500 for overall >= 60 and < 80
颜色逻辑: overall score color classes > uses red-500 for overall < 60
颜色逻辑: overall score color classes > overallColorClass logic: 80+ green, 60+ yellow, <60 red
LS namespace: getToolLsKey > ToolForm handles LS for analysis toolKey (source check)
LS namespace: getToolLsKey > getToolLsKey(accountId, "analysis", "input") returns correct key
LS namespace: getToolLsKey > Analysis.tsx does NOT duplicate LS write (ToolForm owns it)

Schema validation: analysisStructuralInput > copy 10 字 → zod pass
Schema validation: analysisStructuralInput > copy 超过 3000 字 → zod fail
Schema validation: analysisStructuralInput > copy exact 10 chars → zod pass
Schema validation: analysisStructuralInput > copy exact 3000 chars → zod pass
Progress UI component > progress.tsx exists with ProgressPrimitive
Progress UI component > progress.tsx exports Progress component
Progress UI component > progress.tsx supports indicatorClassName prop

表单 render: BoomGenerate.tsx structure > uses submitLabel 一键生成爆款文案

5篇 split: BoomGenerateResult > BoomGenerateResult.tsx splits content by /\n*---\n*/
5篇 split: BoomGenerateResult > renders grid md:grid-cols-2 for 5 candidates
5篇 split: BoomGenerateResult > shows 输出格式异常 when candidates.length !== 5
5篇 split: BoomGenerateResult > renders react-markdown for each candidate
5篇 split: BoomGenerateResult > split of 5-candidate content produces 5 items
5篇 split: BoomGenerateResult > split of malformed content (no ---) produces 1 item, not 5
copy button: BoomGenerateResult > renders copy button for each candidate (boom-copy-N)
copy button: BoomGenerateResult > calls navigator.clipboard.writeText on copy
copy button: BoomGenerateResult > shows toast.success on successful copy
copy button: BoomGenerateResult > shows toast.error on clipboard failure (AC-9)

LS 预填: boomGenerate namespace (D-031 AC-4) > BoomGenerate.tsx reads industry default from useActiveAccount (AC-5)
zod 校验: generateBoomInput > passes with valid elements
zod 校验: generateBoomInput > fails when elements is empty
zod 校验: generateBoomInput > fails when elements exceed 8 items
zod 校验: generateBoomInput > passes with optional industry and theme
zod 校验: generateBoomInput > fails with invalid element key

mutation: boomGenerate.generate > BoomGenerate.tsx calls setResult on handleSuccess

zod 校验: copywritingFreeGenerateInput > fails when scriptType is invalid

mutation success: Generate.tsx shows ToolResult on success > result state controls ToolResult visibility

mutation error toast: ToolForm toast.error on failure > Generate.tsx does not manually rollback LS on error (REJ-035)

LS 预填: freeGenerate namespace (D-031 AC-3) > Generate.tsx uses getToolLsKey with freeGenerate and input suffix
LS 预填: freeGenerate namespace (D-031 AC-3) > ToolForm uses input suffix for LS (not form)
LS 预填: freeGenerate namespace (D-031 AC-3) > LS-first dual-write: localStorage.setItem in Generate.tsx handleSubmit
LS 预填: freeGenerate namespace (D-031 AC-3) > AbortController on unmount prevents state update after navigate away (AC-8)
US-011 stub: history.detail pre-fill > Generate.tsx uses trpc.history.detail.useQuery with historyId
US-011 stub: history.detail pre-fill > query is disabled when historyId is absent (enabled: !!historyId)

elements tag 渲染: VideoAnalysisResult > VideoAnalysisResult imports HOT_ELEMENTS_ZH for Chinese mapping
elements tag 渲染: VideoAnalysisResult > VideoAnalysisResult renders elements with data-testid tags
elements tag 渲染: VideoAnalysisResult > VideoAnalysisResult handles empty elements → 无识别元素
elements tag 渲染: VideoAnalysisResult > VideoAnalysisResult handles JSON.parse failure → 解析失败
elements tag 渲染: VideoAnalysisResult > HOT_ELEMENTS_ZH contains 22 entries
elements tag 渲染: VideoAnalysisResult > HOT_ELEMENTS_ZH has correct mappings
insights 列表: VideoAnalysisResult > renders insights with data-testid
insights 列表: VideoAnalysisResult > renders impact color classes 高/中/低
rewriteVersion markdown: VideoAnalysisResult > imports react-markdown and remark-gfm
rewriteVersion markdown: VideoAnalysisResult > renders rewriteVersion in markdown article with data-testid
LS namespace: ToolForm handles video-analysis storage > ToolForm video-analysis case exists in switch
LS namespace: ToolForm handles video-analysis storage > ToolForm video-analysis default values include lastTitle and lastCopy
LS namespace: ToolForm handles video-analysis storage > getToolLsKey produces correct namespace key for video-analysis
LS namespace: ToolForm handles video-analysis storage > analyzeVideoInput schema validates min 10 chars for lastCopy
AnalysisAgent > viral happy path: returns valid AnalysisViralOutput
AnalysisAgent > viral fallback: schema validation failure triggers isFallback=true
AnalysisAgent > viral cold-start: no userInput context still calls LLM (passthrough inputSchema)
AnalysisAgent > viral config: model_tier=lightweight, streaming=false, timeout_ms=30000
AnalysisAgent > structural happy path: returns valid AnalysisStructuralOutput
AnalysisAgent > structural fallback: bad schema (missing optimizations) → isFallback=true
AnalysisAgent > structural cold-start: LLM called with structural responseFormat schema
AnalysisAgent > structural config: agentId=AnalysisAgent, singleton export works
BrandingAgent > packaging mode (step3) > happy path: returns valid Step3Output with 5 nicknames, 6 bios, writes cost_log
BrandingAgent > packaging mode (step3) > schema retry: nickname wrong length → schema fails twice → fallback (US-015 AC-1)
BrandingAgent > packaging mode (step3) > cold start: succeeds with empty userInput (新用户 · 无历史 stepData)
BrandingAgent > persona mode (step3b) > happy path: returns valid Step3bOutput with correct array lengths
BrandingAgent > persona mode (step3b) > schema retry: coreBeliefs wrong length → schema fails twice → fallback (US-015 AC-1)
BrandingAgent > persona mode (step3b) > cold start: succeeds with empty userInput
BrandingAgent > throws on invalid mode (AC-8 runtime check)
BrandingAgent > config: has correct five-layer structure (AC-1)
CopywritingAgent > happy path: step7 returns valid CopywritingOutput with # heading
CopywritingAgent > AC-10: markdown without # heading → refine fails → fallback (US-015)
CopywritingAgent > AC-11: hooks empty array → zod min(1) fails → fallback (US-015)
CopywritingAgent > AC-12: 断流(incomplete JSON) → retry → fallback (US-015)
CopywritingAgent > acquisition happy: returns valid CopywritingAcquisitionOutput (markdown 200-500 + ctaPosition)
CopywritingAgent > acquisition CTA missing: ctaPosition empty → refine fails → fallback (AC-9)
CopywritingAgent > acquisition markdown boundary: <200 chars fails schema, 200-500 passes (AC-9)
CopywritingAgent > modelUsed reflects stream meta chunk model (D-019 pattern)
CopywritingAgent > config has required 5-layer structure
CopywritingAgent > free happy path: returns valid copywritingFreeOutput with markdown >= 400 chars
CopywritingAgent > free fallback: schema validation failure → isFallback=true
CopywritingAgent > free mode: stream断流 → retry → fallback (同 step7 断流模式)
CopywritingAgent > free mode: modelUsed reflects stream meta chunk (D-019)
CopywritingAgent > boom happy path: returns boomOutput with 5 candidates
CopywritingAgent > boom fallback: bad candidates length → isFallback=true
CopywritingAgent > boom mode: 断流 → retry → fallback
CopywritingAgent > boom mode: modelUsed reflects stream meta chunk (D-019)
LivestreamAgent > happy path: returns lastResult + lastOptimizedResult ≥200 chars each, writes cost_log
LivestreamAgent > fallback: lastResult < 200 chars → schema fails → fallback (US-015 AC-1)
LivestreamAgent > edge: invalid experience value → ZodError before LLM call (AC-5)
LivestreamAgent > cold start: no step data in context → still produces valid output
LivestreamAgent > config: five-layer structure, model_tier=reasoning, timeout_ms=30000, industries constant (AC-1/AC-6/AC-7)
MonetizationAgent > happy path: returns valid Step4bOutput with ladder[3], successCases[2], writes cost_log
MonetizationAgent > fallback: ladder has 4 stages → schema fails twice → returns fallback result (US-015 AC-1)
MonetizationAgent > edge: currentRevenue missing → prompt contains zero-base note, output is valid (AC-5)
MonetizationAgent > cold start: succeeds with empty userInput; prompt contains cold-start note (AC-6)
MonetizationAgent > config: five-layer structure and model_tier correct (AC-1)
PositioningAgent > industry mode (step1) > happy path: returns valid Step1Output and writes cost_log
PositioningAgent > industry mode (step1) > schema retry: two invalid responses → fallback (US-015 AC-1)
PositioningAgent > industry mode (step1) > cold start: succeeds with empty userInput (新用户 · 无历史 stepData)
PositioningAgent > execution mode (step4) > happy path: returns markdown starting with # 执行计划
PositioningAgent > execution mode (step4) > schema retry: wrong heading → schema fails → fallback (US-015 AC-1)
PositioningAgent > execution mode (step4) > cold start: succeeds with minimal input (无 step3 数据)
PositioningAgent > throws on invalid mode (AC-8 runtime check)
PositioningAgent > config: has correct five-layer structure (AC-1)
TopicAgent > happy path: category=traffic returns 20 topics
TopicAgent > happy path: category=monetize returns 20 topics
TopicAgent > happy path: category=persona returns 20 topics
TopicAgent > happy path: category=cognition returns 20 topics
TopicAgent > happy path: category=case returns 20 topics
TopicAgent > edge: 断流(incomplete JSON) → retry → fallback (US-015)
TopicAgent > edge: topics length=19 → zod length(20) 失败 → retry → fallback (US-015)
TopicAgent > modelUsed reflects stream meta chunk model (D-019 / REJ-003)
TopicAgent > config has required 5-layer structure
TopicAgent > AC-9: invalid category rejects with ZodError
TopicAgent > viralPotential not in enum → outputSchema fails
VideoAgent > happy path: returns valid ShootingOutput with shotList[1+], equipment[], schedule, writes cost_log
VideoAgent > fallback: empty shotList → schema fails → fallback (US-015 AC-1)
VideoAgent > edge: sourceCopy exceeding 5000 chars → ZodError before LLM call (AC-6)
VideoAgent > config: five-layer structure, model_tier=reasoning, timeout_ms=45000 (AC-8)
VideoAgent > production happy: returns valid ProductionOutput (shotList + equipment + schedule)
VideoAgent > production outputSchema getter: result validates against ProductionOutputSchema
VideoAgent > production schema fail: empty shotList → fallback (US-015 AC-1)
VideoAgent > acquisition happy: returns valid VideoAcquisitionOutput (script + cta + conversionPath + keyMessages)
VideoAgent > acquisition outputSchema getter: mode switch returns VideoAcquisitionOutputSchema
VideoAgent > acquisition schema fail: missing keyMessages → fallback (US-015 AC-1)
VideoAgent > storyboard happy: 5 scenes all ASCII imagePromptEn → valid StoryboardOutput
VideoAgent > storyboard non-ASCII imagePromptEn: retry once → still fails → fallback (AC-4)
VideoAgent > storyboard outputSchema getter: result validates against StoryboardOutputSchema
US-007 AC-5: analysis.analyze integration — nock SDK + real DB > analyze: calls mock LLM, writes 1 history row (contentType=json) + cost_log to real DB
auth.me HTTP endpoint > GET /trpc/auth.me returns unauthenticated shape
[Integration] mock login flow > AC-2/3/5: mock login creates session cookie + DB row
[Integration] mock login flow > AC-4: auth.me with valid session returns authenticated user
[E2E] CSRF + session lifecycle > AC-8: mock provider bypasses CSRF — mismatched state still completes login
[E2E] CSRF + session lifecycle > AC-11: expired session → auth.me returns unauthenticated
[Perf] login flow timing > AC-13: full mock login flow (callback → session) < 500ms
[Perf] login flow timing > AC-13: auth.me with valid session < 100ms
US-005 AC-3: boomGenerate.generate integration — nock SDK + real DB > generate: calls mock stream, writes 1 history row with --- separator + cost_log to real DB
US-003 AC-4: copywriting.freeGenerate integration — nock SDK + real DB > freeGenerate: calls mock stream, writes history + cost_log to real DB with correct fields
getProgress integration > creates account → inserts 7 stepData completed → progress = 7/9
getProgress integration > in_progress and failed status rows are NOT counted
getProgress integration > step2 is never counted (not in STEP_KEYS_9)
LLMGateway · integration (nock) > complete() calls Anthropic API and returns parsed response
[Integration] RLS account isolation via set_config > AC-3: user A (correct account) sees their own step_data rows
[Integration] RLS account isolation via set_config > AC-3: user B (different account) sees 0 rows from step_data
[Integration] RLS account isolation via set_config > AC-4: no set_config → 0 rows (RLS default-deny via NULL::int)
[Integration] RLS account isolation via set_config > AC-7: set_config round-trip overhead < 50ms on localhost
US-003 AC-10: specialist integration — nock LLM + real DB cost_log > execute() calls Anthropic tool_use, returns valid result, writes cost_log to DB
[Integration] trace_id propagation > echoes provided X-Trace-Id in response header
[Integration] trace_id propagation > generates 16-char hex trace ID when header is absent

US-002 AC-10: VideoAgent invokeLLM integration — nock Anthropic SDK + real DB cost_log > execute(mode=production): nock intercepts Anthropic call, returns valid ProductionOutput, writes cost_log to DB within 3s

US-009 AC-5: videoAnalysis.analyze integration — nock SDK + real DB + elements > analyze: calls mock LLM, writes 1 history row (agentMode=viral, contentType=json) + cost_log + elements mapped from analysis.elements
